message:
Implement DirectMuxClient connection pool (bd-41w)

Add MuxPool wrapping Pool<DirectMuxClient> to manage persistent Unix
socket connections to the WezTerm mux server. Eliminates CLI subprocess
spawning for list_panes, get_lines, and get_pane_render_changes
operations. Includes 13 tests with mock mux server, health checks,
idle eviction, concurrent access, and stats tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
